description: The Azure Cosmos DB Linux-based (vNext) emulator is now fully aligned with the GA vnext-latest image. RunAsPreviewEmulator() pulls mcr.microsoft.com/cosmosdb/linux/azure-cosmos-emulator:vnext-latest; the Data Explorer is now opt-in (call WithDataExplorer() to enable it instead of running unconditionally); and WithDataVolume() no longer sets the AZURE_COSMOS_EMULATOR_ENABLE_DATA_PERSISTENCE variable for the vNext emulator since the GA image uses implicit /data volume persistence instead.
name: Azure Cosmos DB vNext emulator GA alignment
